text: Adobe Inc. operates as a diversified software company worldwide through three primary segments: Digital Media, Digital Experience, and Publishing and Advertising [C002]. The Digital Media segment serves as the company's core revenue driver, offering Creative Cloud subscription services that enable individuals, teams, and enterprises to create, publish, and promote content, alongside Document Cloud, a unified cloud-based document services platform [C002]. The Digital Experience segment provides an integrated platform enabling brands and businesses to create, manage, execute, measure, monetize, and optimize customer experiences from analytics to commerce [C002]. The Publishing and Advertising segment offers e-learning solutions, technical document publishing, web conferencing, and Advertising Cloud offerings [C002]. Adobe distributes products directly to enterprise customers through its sales force and local field offices, as well as to end users through app stores and adobe.com, supplemented by a network of distributors, value-added resellers, systems integrators, and OEMs [C002]. The company employs 30,709 full-time employees and is headquartered in San Jose, California [C001].

issues.offending_span: The Digital Media segment serves as the company's core revenue driver
issues.explanation: C002 describes Creative Cloud as the 'flagship product' but does not state that Digital Media is the 'core revenue driver'. This language implies a revenue characterization not supported by the cited evidence.
issues.recommended_fix: Change to 'The Digital Media segment offers Creative Cloud as its flagship product' or cite additional evidence that specifically characterizes this segment as the core revenue driver.

issues.offending_span: The Digital Experience segment provides an integrated platform enabling brands and businesses to create, manage, execute, measure, monetize, and optimize customer experiences from analytics to commerce

issues.recommended_fix: Either cite a different chunk that contains Digital Experience segment details, or verify the full C002 chunk contains this information before citing.
